# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Create a Jenkins Pipeline that downloads build artifacts from external URLs provided as parameters and deploys them to production servers. This allows us to deploy pre-built artifacts from different sources (S3, Artifactory, HTTP servers) without rebuilding.
# Category: cicd_security

properties([
    parameters([
        string(name: 'ARTIFACT_URL', defaultValue: '', description: 'URL to download the artifact (supports S3, Artifactory, HTTP/HTTPS)'),
        string(name: 'ARTIFACT_NAME', defaultValue: 'application.jar', description: 'Name to save the downloaded artifact'),
        choice(name: 'ENVIRONMENT', choices: ['staging', 'production'], description: 'Target deployment environment'),
        string(name: 'DEPLOYMENT_SERVERS', defaultValue: '', description: 'Comma-separated list of servers to deploy to'),
        string(name: 'DEPLOY_PATH', defaultValue: '/opt/application', description: 'Deployment path on target servers'),
        string(name: 'SERVICE_NAME', defaultValue: 'application', description: 'Service name to restart after deployment'),
        booleanParam(name: 'VERIFY_CHECKSUM', defaultValue: true, description: 'Verify artifact checksum if available'),
        string(name: 'CHECKSUM_URL', defaultValue: '', description: 'URL to checksum file (optional)'),
        choice(name: 'CHECKSUM_TYPE', choices: ['sha256', 'sha1', 'md5'], description: 'Checksum algorithm'),
        booleanParam(name: 'BACKUP_EXISTING', defaultValue: true, description: 'Backup existing artifact before deployment'),
        booleanParam(name: 'ROLLING_DEPLOYMENT', defaultValue: true, description: 'Deploy to servers one at a time'),
        string(name: 'SSH_CREDENTIALS_ID', defaultValue: 'production-ssh-key', description: 'SSH credentials for deployment'),
        string(name: 'AWS_CREDENTIALS_ID', defaultValue: 'aws-credentials', description: 'AWS credentials for S3 downloads'),
        string(name: 'ARTIFACTORY_CREDENTIALS_ID', defaultValue: 'artifactory-credentials', description: 'Artifactory credentials'),
        string(name: 'HEALTH_CHECK_URL', defaultValue: '', description: 'Health check URL to verify deployment'),
        string(name: 'HEALTH_CHECK_TIMEOUT', defaultValue: '300', description: 'Health check timeout in seconds'),
        booleanParam(name: 'DRY_RUN', defaultValue: false, description: 'Perform dry run without actual deployment')
    ])
])

pipeline {
    agent any
    
    environment {
        WORKSPACE_ARTIFACTS = "${WORKSPACE}/artifacts"
        DEPLOYMENT_TIMESTAMP = sh(script: "date +%Y%m%d_%H%M%S", returnStdout: true).trim()
    }
    
    stages {
        stage('Validate Parameters') {
            steps {
                script {
                    if (!params.ARTIFACT_URL) {
                        error("ARTIFACT_URL parameter is required")
                    }
                    if (!params.DEPLOYMENT_SERVERS) {
                        error("DEPLOYMENT_SERVERS parameter is required")
                    }
                    
                    echo "Artifact URL: ${params.ARTIFACT_URL}"
                    echo "Target Environment: ${params.ENVIRONMENT}"
                    echo "Deployment Servers: ${params.DEPLOYMENT_SERVERS}"
                    echo "Dry Run: ${params.DRY_RUN}"
                }
            }
        }
        
        stage('Prepare Workspace') {
            steps {
                script {
                    sh "mkdir -p ${WORKSPACE_ARTIFACTS}"
                    sh "rm -rf ${WORKSPACE_ARTIFACTS}/*"
                }
            }
        }
        
        stage('Download Artifact') {
            steps {
                script {
                    def artifactPath = "${WORKSPACE_ARTIFACTS}/${params.ARTIFACT_NAME}"
                    def url = params.ARTIFACT_URL
                    
                    if (url.startsWith('s3://')) {
                        downloadFromS3(url, artifactPath)
                    } else if (url.contains('artifactory')) {
                        downloadFromArtifactory(url, artifactPath)
                    } else if (url.startsWith('http://') || url.startsWith('https://')) {
                        downloadFromHTTP(url, artifactPath)
                    } else {
                        error("Unsupported URL scheme: ${url}")
                    }
                    
                    sh "ls -lh ${artifactPath}"
                    def fileSize = sh(script: "stat -f%z ${artifactPath} 2>/dev/null || stat -c%s ${artifactPath}", returnStdout: true).trim()
                    echo "Downloaded artifact size: ${fileSize} bytes"
                }
            }
        }
        
        stage('Verify Checksum') {
            when {
                expression { params.VERIFY_CHECKSUM && params.CHECKSUM_URL }
            }
            steps {
                script {
                    def artifactPath = "${WORKSPACE_ARTIFACTS}/${params.ARTIFACT_NAME}"
                    def checksumPath = "${WORKSPACE_ARTIFACTS}/checksum.txt"
                    
                    downloadFromHTTP(params.CHECKSUM_URL, checksumPath)
                    
                    def expectedChecksum = sh(script: "cat ${checksumPath} | awk '{print \$1}'", returnStdout: true).trim()
                    def actualChecksum = sh(script: "${params.CHECKSUM_TYPE}sum ${artifactPath} | awk '{print \$1}'", returnStdout: true).trim()
                    
                    echo "Expected ${params.CHECKSUM_TYPE}: ${expectedChecksum}"
                    echo "Actual ${params.CHECKSUM_TYPE}: ${actualChecksum}"
                    
                    if (expectedChecksum != actualChecksum) {
                        error("Checksum verification failed!")
                    }
                    echo "Checksum verification successful"
                }
            }
        }
        
        stage('Prepare Deployment Package') {
            steps {
                script {
                    def deployScript = """#!/bin/bash
set -e

ARTIFACT_NAME="${params.ARTIFACT_NAME}"
DEPLOY_PATH="${params.DEPLOY_PATH}"
SERVICE_NAME="${params.SERVICE_NAME}"
BACKUP_EXISTING="${params.BACKUP_EXISTING}"
TIMESTAMP="${DEPLOYMENT_TIMESTAMP}"

if [ "\$BACKUP_EXISTING" = "true" ] && [ -f "\$DEPLOY_PATH/\$ARTIFACT_NAME" ]; then
    BACKUP_DIR="\$DEPLOY_PATH/backups"
    mkdir -p "\$BACKUP_DIR"
    cp "\$DEPLOY_PATH/\$ARTIFACT_NAME" "\$BACKUP_DIR/\$ARTIFACT_NAME.\$TIMESTAMP.bak"
    echo "Backed up existing artifact to \$BACKUP_DIR/\$ARTIFACT_NAME.\$TIMESTAMP.bak"
fi

mkdir -p "\$DEPLOY_PATH"
cp /tmp/\$ARTIFACT_NAME "\$DEPLOY_PATH/\$ARTIFACT_NAME"
chmod 644 "\$DEPLOY_PATH/\$ARTIFACT_NAME"

if systemctl is-active --quiet "\$SERVICE_NAME"; then
    echo "Restarting service \$SERVICE_NAME..."
    sudo systemctl restart "\$SERVICE_NAME"
    sleep 5
    
    if systemctl is-active --quiet "\$SERVICE_NAME"; then
        echo "Service \$SERVICE_NAME restarted successfully"
    else
        echo "Service \$SERVICE_NAME failed to start"
        exit 1
    fi
else
    echo "Service \$SERVICE_NAME is not running, starting it..."
    sudo systemctl start "\$SERVICE_NAME"
fi

echo "Deployment completed successfully on \$(hostname)"
"""
                    
                    writeFile file: "${WORKSPACE_ARTIFACTS}/deploy.sh", text: deployScript
                    sh "chmod +x ${WORKSPACE_ARTIFACTS}/deploy.sh"
                }
            }
        }
        
        stage('Deploy to Servers') {
            steps {
                script {
                    def servers = params.DEPLOYMENT_SERVERS.split(',').collect { it.trim() }
                    def artifactPath = "${WORKSPACE_ARTIFACTS}/${params.ARTIFACT_NAME}"
                    def deployScriptPath = "${WORKSPACE_ARTIFACTS}/deploy.sh"
                    
                    if (params.DRY_RUN) {
                        echo "DRY RUN: Would deploy to servers: ${servers}"
                        return
                    }
                    
                    if (params.ROLLING_DEPLOYMENT) {
                        for (server in servers) {
                            deployToServer(server, artifactPath, deployScriptPath)
                            if (params.HEALTH_CHECK_URL) {
                                performHealthCheck(server)
                            }
                        }
                    } else {
                        def deploymentTasks = [:]
                        servers.each { server ->
                            deploymentTasks[server] = {
                                deployToServer(server, artifactPath, deployScriptPath)
                            }
                        }
                        parallel deploymentTasks
                        
                        if (params.HEALTH_CHECK_URL) {
                            servers.each { server ->
                                performHealthCheck(server)
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        }
        
        stage('Verify Deployment') {
            steps {
                script {
                    def servers = params.DEPLOYMENT_SERVERS.split(',').collect { it.trim() }
                    
                    if (params.DRY_RUN) {
                        echo "DRY RUN: Skipping verification"
                        return
                    }
                    
                    servers.each { server ->
                        sshagent([params.SSH_CREDENTIALS_ID]) {
                            def checkCmd = """
                                ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no ${server} '
                                    if [ -f ${params.DEPLOY_PATH}/${params.ARTIFACT_NAME} ]; then
                                        echo "Artifact exists"
                                        ls -lh ${params.DEPLOY_PATH}/${params.ARTIFACT_NAME}
                                        systemctl status ${params.SERVICE_NAME} --no-pager
                                    else
                                        echo "Artifact not found"
                                        exit 1
                                    fi
                                '
                            """
                            sh checkCmd
                        }
                        echo "Verification successful on ${server}"
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    }
    
    post {
        success {
            echo "Deployment completed successfully to ${params.ENVIRONMENT}"
            script {
                def servers = params.DEPLOYMENT_SERVERS.split(',').collect { it.trim() }
                echo "Deployed ${params.ARTIFACT_NAME} to ${servers.size()} server(s)"
            }
        }
        failure {
            echo "Deployment failed"
            script {
                if (!params.DRY_RUN && params.BACKUP_EXISTING) {
                    echo "Backups are available for rollback"
                }
            }
        }
        cleanup {
            script {
                sh "rm -rf ${WORKSPACE_ARTIFACTS}"
            }
        }
    }
}

def downloadFromS3(String s3Url, String destination) {
    def bucket = s3Url.replaceAll('s3://', '').split('/')[0]
    def key = s3Url.replaceAll("s3://${bucket}/", '')
    
    withCredentials([[$class: 'AmazonWebServicesCredentialsBinding', 
                      credentialsId: params.AWS_CREDENTIALS_ID]]) {
        sh """
            aws s3 cp "${s3Url}" "${destination}"
        """
    }
    echo "Downloaded from S3: ${s3Url}"
}

def downloadFromArtifactory(String url, String destination) {
    withCredentials([usernamePassword(credentialsId: params.ARTIFACTORY_CREDENTIALS_ID,
                                      usernameVariable: 'ARTIFACTORY_USER',
                                      passwordVariable: 'ARTIFACTORY_PASSWORD')]) {
        sh """
            curl -u \$ARTIFACTORY_USER:\$ARTIFACTORY_PASSWORD -L -o "${destination}" "${url}"
        """
    }
    echo "Downloaded from Artifactory: ${url}"
}

def downloadFromHTTP(String url, String destination) {
    sh """
        curl -L -o "${destination}" "${url}"
    """
    echo "Downloaded from HTTP: ${url}"
}

def deployToServer(String server, String artifactPath, String deployScriptPath) {
    echo "Deploying to ${server}..."
    
    sshagent([params.SSH_CREDENTIALS_ID]) {
        sh """
            scp -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no ${artifactPath} ${server}:/tmp/${params.ARTIFACT_NAME}
            scp -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no ${deployScriptPath} ${server}:/tmp/deploy.sh
            ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no ${server} 'chmod +x /tmp/deploy.sh && /tmp/deploy.sh'
            ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no ${server} 'rm -f /tmp/deploy.sh /tmp/${params.ARTIFACT_NAME}'
        """
    }
    
    echo "Deployment to ${server} completed"
}

def performHealthCheck(String server) {
    echo "Performing health check on ${server}..."
    
    def healthUrl = params.HEALTH_CHECK_URL.replace('SERVER_PLACEHOLDER', server)
    def timeout = params.HEALTH_CHECK_TIMEOUT.toInteger()
    def maxAttempts = timeout / 10
    def attempt = 0
    
    while (attempt < maxAttempts) {
        try {
            def response = sh(script: "curl -s -o /dev/null -w '%{http_code}' ${healthUrl}", returnStdout: true).trim()
            if (response == '200') {
                echo "Health check passed for ${server}"
                return
            }
        } catch (Exception e) {
            echo "Health check attempt ${attempt + 1} failed: ${e.message}"
        }
        attempt++
        sleep(10)
    }
    
    error("Health check failed for ${server} after ${timeout} seconds")
}
